message:
feat(cli,config): respect --db override and graceful fallback across subcommands

Switched blocked, config, doctor, orphans, and where commands from
discover_beads_dir(None) to the *_with_cli(overrides) variants so the
--db CLI flag is consistently honored.

- blocked: uses discover_beads_dir_with_cli(overrides)
- config (Path/List/Set/Get/Delete): uses
  discover_optional_beads_dir_with_cli() so config works outside a
  project when no explicit --db is given; show_paths and set_config_value
  now accept CliOverrides
- doctor: uses discover_optional_beads_dir_with_cli(cli) to handle
  missing workspace gracefully instead of erroring
- orphans: surfaces errors for invalid explicit --db targets but returns
  empty for missing workspace; removed redundant fallible storage open
- where: refactored into resolve_where_output() helper using
  discover_optional_beads_dir_with_cli; added Debug on WhereOutput;
  added two unit tests (explicit override, invalid override error)
- config/mod.rs: added discover_optional_beads_dir_with_cli() returning
  Option<PathBuf> instead of Result; added two unit tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
